title: Fine Artists, Including Painters, Sculptors, and Illustrators
description: Create original artwork using any of a wide variety of media and techniques.

tasks.text: Use materials such as pens and ink, watercolors, charcoal, oil, or computer software to create artwork.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Integrate and develop visual elements, such as line, space, mass, color, and perspective, to produce desired effects, such as the illustration of ideas, emotions, or moods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with clients, editors, writers, art directors, and other interested parties regarding the nature and content of artwork to be produced.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain portfolios of artistic work to demonstrate styles, interests, and abilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Market artwork through brochures, mailings, or Web sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study different techniques to learn how to apply them to artistic endeavors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor events, trends, and other circumstances, research specific subject areas, attend art exhibitions, and read art publications to develop ideas and keep current on art world activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Photograph objects, places, or scenes for reference material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Model substances such as clay or wax, using fingers and small hand tools to form objects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create sculptures, statues, and other three-dimensional artwork by using abrasives and tools to shape, carve, and fabricate materials such as clay, stone, wood, or metal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up exhibitions of artwork for display or sale.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Render drawings, illustrations, and sketches of buildings, manufactured products, or models, working from sketches, blueprints, memory, models, or reference materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shade and fill in sketch outlines and backgrounds, using a variety of media such as water colors, markers, and transparent washes, labeling designated colors when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Frame and mat artwork for display or sale.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Submit artwork to shows or galleries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Submit preliminary or finished artwork or project plans to clients for approval, incorporating changes as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with engineers, mechanics, and other technical experts as necessary to build and install creations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cut, bend, laminate, arrange, and fasten individual or mixed raw and manufactured materials and products to form works of art.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide entertainment at special events by performing activities such as drawing cartoons.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop project budgets for approval, estimating time lines and material costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create and prepare sketches and model drawings of cartoon characters, providing details from memory, live models, manufactured products, or reference materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create finished art work as decoration, or to elucidate or substitute for spoken or written messages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create sketches, profiles, or likenesses of posed subjects or photographs, using any combination of freehand drawing, mechanical assembly kits, and computer imaging.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trace drawings onto clear acetate for painting or coloring, or trace them with ink to make final copies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply solvents and cleaning agents to clean surfaces of paintings, and to remove accretions, discolorations, and deteriorated varnish.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with writers who create ideas, stories, or captions that are combined with artists' work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Brush or spray protective or decorative finishes on completed background panels, informational legends, exhibit accessories, or finished paintings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach artistic techniques to children or adults.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
